rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHAI YEON CHANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Petitioner alleges that certain assets were transferred to surviving spouse, on the advice of tax advisors for tax purposes. Petitioner alleges that the assets were under his control at all times, despite the titling of the account, and the transfer should not be considered a preliminary distribution. 2) Assets currently in the surviving spouse's name comprise of 595.88 shares of 3M stock and $408,209 in cash. Court to determine whether assets should be transferred back to the estate, and whether the court can order distribution from a non estate account. 3) The gains on sale of stock options reported in the petition cannot be verified, as the report on sales has not been separated by vested and unvested stocks (despite prior Examiner's Notes requesting such division).
